title: Alpha
description: Extends SDD path documentation to name the Builder effect — Cycle Spec narrows Builder interpretive surface, not just Orchestrator decomposition.
highlights: Site restructured to three pages: index (5-min), framework, playbook
Interactive role map with spatial human/agent zones and detail panel
Predictability reframe in Scrum callout: gate model as guarantee, not forecast
Capacity forecasting callout in Section 09: throughput as observed signal, not declared estimate
SDD path: Cycle Spec narrows Builder interpretive surface — interface contracts and constraints pre-resolved at spec-write time
